descriptionByLocale.en:
Specialist Health Professional Night Watch Team — Psychiatric Services Aargau (PDAG)

Your responsibilities:
- You ensure professional care and support for patients during the night in collaboration with the interdisciplinary team.
- You are responsible for monitoring and ensuring the safety of patients during the night.
- You carry out nursing interventions independently and competently according to the care plan.
- You document the care provided in a professional and comprehensible manner.
- You contribute to maintaining and promoting quality standards in nursing.

Your profile:
- Completed training as a Specialist Health Professional (Fachfrau/Fachmann Gesundheit EFZ).
- Professional experience in psychiatry is an advantage.
- High level of responsibility, reliability, and ability to work independently.
- Resilience and flexibility to handle the challenges of night shifts.
- Good communication skills and a respectful approach to patients and colleagues.

Our offer:
- A varied and responsible position in a dynamic and interdisciplinary environment.
- Comprehensive introduction and support during the onboarding phase.
- Opportunities for further education and professional development.
- Attractive employment conditions and benefits in accordance with the guidelines of the Psychiatric Services Aargau (PDAG).
- A workplace in a modern and well-equipped environment.

Would you like to contribute to the well-being of our patients with your expertise and commitment? We look forward to receiving your application!

descriptionByLocale.de: Sozialarbeiterin / Sozialarbeiter FH Ambulatorium — Psychiatrische Dienste Aargau (PDAG)
descriptionByLocale.it:
Assistente sociale FH Ambulatorio — Servizi Psichiatrici Argovia (PDAG)

Compiti principali:
- Consulenza e supporto sociale per pazienti ambulatoriali e i loro familiari.
- Valutazione della situazione sociale e pianificazione di misure di sostegno adeguate.
- Collaborazione interdisciplinare con medici, psicologi e altri professionisti della salute.
- Coordinamento con istituzioni esterne come autorità, assicurazioni sociali e organizzazioni di supporto.
- Documentazione e gestione amministrativa delle attività svolte.

Requisiti:
- Diploma di assistente sociale FH o formazione equivalente riconosciuta.
- Esperienza professionale nel settore psichiatrico o in ambito sanitario è un vantaggio.
- Capacità di lavorare in modo autonomo e orientato alle soluzioni.
- Eccellenti competenze comunicative e capacità di lavorare in team.
- Buona conoscenza delle lingue nazionali e, idealmente, dell'inglese.

Offriamo:
- Un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e interdisciplinare.
- Opportunità di formazione continua e sviluppo professionale.
- Condizioni di lavoro moderne e flessibili.
- Un team motivato e collaborativo.

Luogo di lavoro:
Ambulatorio dei Servizi Psichiatrici Argovia (PDAG).

Candidatura:
Se questa posizione corrisponde al suo profilo e desidera contribuire con le sue competenze al nostro team, la invitiamo a inviare la sua candidatura completa tramite il nostro portale online.
descriptionByLocale.en:
Social Worker FH Outpatient Clinic — Psychiatric Services Aargau (PDAG)

Your responsibilities:
- Providing social work support to patients in the outpatient clinic, including counseling and assistance in social, financial, and legal matters.
- Collaborating closely with the interdisciplinary team to ensure comprehensive care for patients.
- Supporting patients in reintegration into their social and professional environments.
- Networking with external institutions and authorities to coordinate and optimize patient care.
- Documenting and reporting on social work interventions and progress.

Your profile:
- Completed degree in social work (FH or equivalent).
- Professional experience in the field of psychiatry or healthcare is an advantage.
- Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work in an interdisciplinary team.
- Independent, structured, and solution-oriented working style.
- Resilience and flexibility in dealing with challenging situations.

What we offer:
- A varied and responsible role in a dynamic and interdisciplinary environment.
- Opportunities for professional development and further training.
- Attractive employment conditions and benefits.
- A supportive and collegial team atmosphere.

We look forward to receiving your application!
